name: com.ezg.tracking
description: Game-agnostic analytics engine. Forwards events and user properties to Firebase Analytics and AppsFlyer through typed configs, plain dictionaries, or any enum. The consuming project supplies its own events and a user-property provider via the engine's extension points — the package itself knows nothing about any specific game. Requires Firebase Analytics, AppsFlyer and UniTask. Import the 'Integration Demo' sample for a runnable starting point.

samples.description: Self-contained starter: event enum + typed config, a user-property provider, .Send() extensions, copy-paste call sites, and a runnable demo scene. Import it, then rename the events/fields and replace the provider body with your own player data.
